qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the following C function: int f(int n) { static int r = 0; if (n <= 0) return 1; if (n > 3) { r = n; return f(n-2) + 2; } return f(n-1) + r; }

qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the following function. double f(double x){ if( abs(x*x - 3) < 0.01) return x; else return f(x/2 + 1.5/x); } Give a value (to decimals) such that will return :_____.
